posts.author: Scalti (Drew G)
posts.cookedHtml:
Example of current behavior: Imgur: The magic of the Internet

Expected behavior is to drag into the field and immediately release mouse button to drop file in. Instead, the formatting ribbon appears and results in opening the file in the browser which then prompts a download that duplicates the file.
